items.message: feat: v2.0.0 — rechtssichere freiwillige Unterstützung + Was-ist-neu Popup
fix(nav): Bottom-Nav stabilisieren bei Sprachwechsel
fix: repair broken merge of improve-nav + add-sync-backend
chore: update app icons and favicon to new logo
Add files via upload
feat: Onboarding-Seite bei leerem Dashboard + Info-Sektion in Settings
feat: Produktbilder automatisch per Barcode beim Import nachladen
chore: update package-lock.json after npm install
fix: Hauptkamera statt Weitwinkel auswählen + Autofokus erzwingen
Fix field-clear propagation in product sync and allow re-pairing
Refactor navigation and remove barcode scanner functionality; integrate inline barcode scanning in ProductForm
feat(sync-backend): initialize backend with Fastify, SQLite, and CORS support
Add preview video section to README (EN + DE)
Fix API image download with CORS fallback
Simplify CI/CD: single job, main-only, no matrix
Polish repo for public release: README, CHANGELOG, cleanup
Allow deleting products from the archive view
Fix status color strip not visible in light mode
Auto-load product images from Open Food Facts API after barcode scan
Fix Lighthouse accessibility: contrast ratios and heading order
Add missing light mode overrides for opacity variants and autofill
Fix Arabic (RTL) layout: replace physical CSS with logical properties
Add code review report for Italian/French language support
Add Italian (it) and French (fr) language support
Update language switcher summary in README
Fix 15+ bugs found during comprehensive code review
Add Arabic (AR) language support and fix language switcher layout
Fix Portuguese flag: use Portugal 🇵🇹 instead of Brazil 🇧🇷
Add Portuguese (PT) language support
